expectations.evidence: Summary section describes project and identifies most critical findings.
19 individual findings each as separate subsections.

expectations.text: Each finding has a severity level
expectations.evidence: Every finding prefixed with [CRITICAL], [HIGH], [MEDIUM], or [LOW].
Every finding includes Category line from the taxonomy.

expectations.text: Each finding cites file paths with line numbers
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes Location with file paths and line numbers.
Every finding includes Evidence section with code snippets.

expectations.text: Each finding includes a suggested fix
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes Suggested fix line.

expectations.text: Each finding includes an effort estimate
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes Effort line using the defined scale.
Critical → High → Medium → Low ordering.
Section covers SQL Injection, Race Conditions, Dependencies, etc.
AssertionError finding is self-contradictory and not properly verified.
Summary with finding counts by severity.
36 findings organized by severity tiers.

expectations.text: Each finding has a severity level
expectations.evidence: Uses non-standard groupings: CRITICAL, HIGH (Security), MODERATE, PERFORMANCE, LOW.
No explicit category labels; Security and Performance used as severity levels.

expectations.text: Each finding cites file paths with line numbers
expectations.evidence: Most findings include file paths and line numbers.
Most findings include code snippets.

expectations.text: Each finding includes a suggested fix
expectations.evidence: Most findings include Fix line.

expectations.text: Each finding includes an effort estimate
expectations.evidence: No effort estimates provided.
CRITICAL → HIGH → MODERATE → PERFORMANCE → LOW.
No Issues Not Found section. Has Remediation Plan and Architectural Observations instead.
SQL pattern finding is speculative. AssertionError finding has contradictory text.
